changedFiles.reason: Defined the clean committed PR boundary and hard budget gate.
Recorded implementation and root-cause process correction evidence.
Added a fail-closed clean-worktree boundary before aggregate PR validation.
Added dirty rejection and clean acceptance regression tests.
Updated adopter lifecycle regression to commit the archived bundle before PR validation.
Added explicit reviewed-empty-unknowns handling for bounded medium-risk Contracts.
Added regression coverage for the reviewed-empty-unknowns preflight path.
Removed the self-referential aiSummary prerequisite from Summary validation.
Added regression coverage for fresh Summary validation.
Raised measured code/archive ceilings and recorded repayment; no budget-only Work Item.
Aligned the primary lifecycle guide with the committed PR boundary.
Preserved the first blocked Preflight request as immutable evidence of the corrected Contract gap.
Preserved the second blocked Preflight request as evidence before acceptance criteria were tightened.
Preserved the final blocked Preflight request before the Contract became ready.
Generated no-active cockpit status after archival.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Dirty release evidence or other uncommitted paths are rejected at PR boundary.
A clean committed PR bundle passes the boundary gate in template and adopter flows.

guidelinesCompliance.guideline: Keep the PR boundary fail-closed and preserve ordinary paired ownership.
guidelinesCompliance.evidence: scripts/ai_check_pr.py rejects any dirty worktree before aggregate ownership validation.

guidelinesCompliance.guideline: Do not create a budget-only Work Item; record measured growth with repayment in the functional Contract.
guidelinesCompliance.evidence: Contract and governance complexity policy record archive/code growth and conditional repayment.

guidelinesCompliance.guideline: Use canonical finalizer/preflight commands; do not hand-edit generated release evidence.
guidelinesCompliance.evidence: This Work Item changes the PR boundary only; release evidence remains generated by canonical finalizer and preflight commands in the later release Work Item.

guidelinesCompliance.guideline: Keep release-process changes scoped to the template repository and distinguish template from adopter runtime.
guidelinesCompliance.evidence: Contract scope contains only template governance scripts, tests, and guard policy; adopter runtime and release provider assets are explicitly out of scope.

guidelinesCompliance.guideline: Do not publish tags or provider assets from this Work Item.
guidelinesCompliance.evidence: No tag, release, or provider operation is performed; publication is explicitly deferred to the final release Work Item.

risk.detail: Global PR-boundary behavior changes for template and adopter lifecycle validation; product runtime and publication remain out of scope.

observedIssues: The first full quality run exposed an adopter E2E test using the old pre-commit PR-check order; the test was updated in this same Work Item.
The previous summary referenced stale test names and a completed cleanup Work Item as budget repayment; both were corrected in this same Work Item.
Preflight generated three blocked decision request records before the Contract became ready; they are retained and explicitly owned by this Summary.

reviewReadiness.reason: All required verification passed and no residual risk remains.
expectedReviewFocus: Verify dirty release evidence cannot enter a PR only from the local worktree.
Verify clean committed PR bundles retain ordinary paired ownership.
Verify format, budget, and CI gates remain hard fail-closed.

userCorrectionsCaptured: 预算、格式、Contract、Summary 不完整时，先在当前功能工单内修正；不要为这些局部问题另开工单。
发现流程性问题时停止发布，先做集中根因复盘和流程修正；不要逐个 CI 症状递归开工单。
必须区分 template 工程与 adopter 对象工程。

userCorrectionSolidification.correction: 当前功能工单内闭环修正其自身预算、格式、Contract、Summary 和测试证据问题。
userCorrectionSolidification.solidifiedIn: release_pr_commit_boundary Contract acceptance, budgetImpact, tests/test_adoption_e2e.py, and Summary observedIssues

userCorrectionSolidification.correction: PR 边界固定为 archive → commit → check-ai-pr → push/PR。

overclaimPrevention: Do not report completion for checks or behavior that were not verified.
